title: On Joe Rogan, Pierre Poilievre Talks Trump, Canada Tariffs and Bruce Lee
summary_full: Floundering in the polls, Pierre Poilievre, the leader of Canada’s Conservatives, sat down with the popular podcaster in hopes of raising his standing at home and abroad.
summary_public: Floundering in the polls, Pierre Poilievre, the leader of Canada’s Conservatives, sat down with the popular podcaster in hopes of raising his standing at home and abroad.
